title: AI Arena 2026: Online MCQ Quiz Competition
description: Free online AI-themed MCQ quiz. Participate to earn a participation certificate and improve your knowledge.

title: CampusOrbit National Aptitude & Logic Olympiad 1.0
description: Participate in the CampusOrbit National Aptitude & Logic Olympiad 1.0, an online aptitude championship designed to test and enhance your quantitative aptitude, logical reasoning, and verbal ability skills. Open for individual participation, the competition offers certificates, national recognition, leaderboard rankings, career opportunities, and exciting prizes for top performers.

title: Logo League 2026
description: Online logo design quiz competition for students. Individual participation with exciting learning opportunities.

title: Brain Battle 2026
description: Online knowledge quiz for students with individual participation.

title: Case Converge 1.0
description: National online case competition designed to test analytical and strategic thinking.

title: BrainOff 2026: India's Biggest AI Quiz
description: Join BrainOff 2026, India's biggest online AI quiz for college students. Test your knowledge of artificial intelligence, emerging technologies, and problem-solving while competing with participants from across the country. Stand a chance to win from a ₹3,75,000 cash prize pool, with the top 50 participants receiving Premium AI Courses worth ₹7,500 each. All eligible participants will receive certificates, making it an excellent opportunity to learn, compete, and showcase your AI expertise on a national platform.
